target: 52. Hiruko Cave
Hizuru Minakata
I can see iron bars. It seems this is a dead end.
The Shadows came from this direction... Is this a secret passage just for them?
This makes it clear. The Shadows have been using the sewers and underground tunnels to move around the island.
Hmm... and the underground around here has been dug up over and over by the military...
No one knows its full extent anymore... It wouldn't be strange if there were countless secret passages like this.
But what should we do? We don't have tools to cut steel bars...
Should we go up and look for another entrance? According to the map, we're right around the middle of the island.
No... there probably aren't any entrances or exits. At least, none that a person could pass through...
Look. What's past there isn't the sewer... It's probably a natural cave that was originally here.
…Hiruko Cave really existed...
Eh?
It's a story I heard from my grandpa when I was a kid...
He said there was a massive cavern lying beneath Hitogashima Island... That's Hiruko Cave.
Apparently, until the mid-Meiji period, there was an entrance near Hitogashima Port that only appeared at low tide.
During the First Sino-Japanese War... The army supposedly sealed it up when they renovated the port—

This island's legend... I thought it was just a made-up story— But it's <color=#GF_TIPS_054>the place where the guardian deity of Hitogashima, Hiruko-sama, is said to have settled after washing ashore</color> long ago.
The Hiruko legend... My sister should know a lot about it. Shall we switch?
Don't! …Not right now…
We could try asking Karikiri's son... If his old man were still alive... He might've known something.
Either way, we'll need a hacksaw to get through here. Let's head back for now—

…Shh!
Be quiet…
Mio Kofune
Heey, let's just go back already! There's no way she's in a place like this...
What I saw wasn't a mistake!! You saw it too, right, Tetsu-san!
Ahhh, geez... Now I smell like nasty sewage... I'm gonna have to take a bath before going to Miyako...
Jeez! I'll be sure to tell Erika-san how reliable Tetsu-san was!
Eh! Really!?
…Is what I'd like to say, but it looks like it's a dead end up ahead. There's an iron gate.
Shiori-chan!!
Hold on a sec, Mio-chan!
How did she...? How did she get to the other side of the gate—
So bright...!?
Wh... What was that!? The iron gate vanished in an instant...!!?
Tastes bad...
Wait!! Shiori-chan...!!
Are we dreaming?
Eh!? Yer going!? Mio-chan!!
You gotta be kidding me...!
Hizuru Minakata
…Hey, just now…
Mio Kofune-san... and Officer Tetsu Totsumura. The one who mistook my sister for an H-cup...
No!! I'm talking about the Shadow that made the iron gate disappear!!!
…Maybe it was right on the mark. My sister's bad feeling...
I wouldn't follow them. It's a trap.
But at least Mio-san is human. She has immunity.
…Tch! Don't blame me... whatever comes out of there.
